system.description: The character's force of personality is so great that it can inspire or terrify all around them.
system.benefit: The character's social interaction abilities affect a much wider area. The range of any Fellowship-based test that affects an area or group is doubled. In addition, the character may affect a number of additional targets equal to their Fellowship Bonus.

prerequisites.text: Fellowship 50, Inspire Wrath or Master Orator

system.notes: Double range of Fellowship area tests. Affect FelB additional targets.
